hooks.command: node -e "const c=[];process.stdin.on('data',d=>c.push(d));process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(Buffer.concat(c).toString());const fp=j.tool_input&&j.tool_input.file_path;if(fp&&/.(java|vue|js|ts|xml|yml|yaml|sql|css|scss|html)$/i.test(fp)){console.log(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'[ECC] '+fp.split(/[/\\]/).pop()+' changed — everything-claude-code active',hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PostToolUse',additionalContext:'File '+fp+' was modified. Apply everything-claude-code and everything-claude-code-conventions: verify naming conventions (camelCase JS, PascalCase Vue pages), code style (2-space indent, single quotes), error handling (try-catch), commit format (conventional commits).'}}))}}catch(e){}});process.stdin.resume()"

node -e "const c=[];process.stdin.on('data',d=>c.push(d));process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(Buffer.concat(c).toString());console.log(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'[ECC] Session ended — consider conventional commit (feat/fix/docs/chore)'}))}catch(e){}});process.stdin.resume()"
